title: yyz's backpack restrictions
description: Prevents backpacks from yyz's backpacks to be placed into Shulker Boxes and Bundles.
body:
Simple Fabric mod that prevents backpacks from the [yyz's backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/yyzs-backpack) mod to be placed into Shulker Boxes, Bundles and any other container items, such as backpacks from other mods.

This feature will (hopefully) be part of [yyz's backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/yyzs-backpack) soon.
